logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.subtitle: Edit your profile information

photo.hint: Crop the image as a square to center the area kept in the round avatar.
photo.permissionMessage: Allow access to your photos to pick an image.
photo.deleteConfirmMessage: Do you want to remove your profile photo?

edit.helpText: Optional fields can be empty. Leaving "Phone", "First name" or "Last name" empty clears the value.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Profile settings and user options
preferences.message: Profile preferences will be configured here.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Change your password
security.cardBody: Enter your current password then choose a new secure password.

validation.newTooShort: The new password must contain at least 8 characters
validation.sameAsOld: The new password must be different from the previous one

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.body: If you don't remember your current password, use the email reset flow.

data.title: Data management
data.body: You can request an export of your personal data before deleting your account.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.body: Account deletion is irreversible on the user side. The backend currently performs a soft delete.
danger.confirmMessage: This action erases your data via account deletion (backend soft delete). Do you want to continue?

guide.title: Getting started guide
guide.body: Discover the main features of Remindy: dashboard, subscriptions, cloud, promotions and security, with highlights of important areas right in the app.
guide.resetSuccessMessage: The guide will be offered again next time you open the application.
guide.resetErrorMessage: Unable to reset the guide right now.

support.title: Support
support.body: If you have a problem, see the About page to contact support or retry from the actions in the app.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Information about the app
about.description: App to track subscriptions, reminders and manage your everyday services.
